ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immigration_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immigration record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the immigration data */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of immigrants */,
  "family" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the family category */,
  "employment" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the employment category */,
  "immediate_relatives" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the immediate relatives category */,
  "diversity" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the diversity category */,
  "refugee" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the refugee category */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the other category */,
  "visa_type" TEXT /* Type of visa (e.g., tourist, student, work) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of immigrants */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender (e.g., 50% male, 50% female) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of immigrants */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the immigration record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immigration_records_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immigration_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the immigration category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the immigration category */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the immigration category (1 being the highest) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the category data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the immigration data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the year data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immigration_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the immigration category */,
  "immigrants_count" INTEGER /* Number of immigrants in the specified category and year */,
  "average_stay_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of stay in months */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immigration_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immigration_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immigration_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES immigration_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the immigration record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES immigration_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the immigration record being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the validation entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES immigration_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the demographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the economic indicator data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
